summary: Tested Operator Portal Enhancements - Dashboard tiles, team tasks, admin stats, delete permissions. Backend 13/13 tests passed. Frontend tiles working with correct light-up behavior and navigation.

issues: Operators and Subs tabs not shown to founder when viewing ops mode - this may be intentional since founders access these via /admin portal. Manager operators need to be tested with actual login to verify visibility.

passed_tests: GET /api/ops/dashboard-events - Returns all 6 event types (tvt, milestones, dts, emergency, p1, support)
GET /api/ops/dashboard-events - Contains recent_activity with arrays for tvt, milestones, dts, emergency
GET /api/ops/dashboard-events - Contains timestamp
GET /api/ops/team-tasks - Returns team data structure with operators and their tasks
GET /api/ops/team-tasks - Each operator has id, name, operator_role, tasks, task_count
GET /api/admin/stats - Contains new fields: pending_milestones, pending_emergency, p1_emergencies, open_escalations
GET /api/admin/stats - Existing fields still present
GET /api/ops/dashboard - Returns operators, queues, timestamp
Founder can list all operators
DELETE requires password parameter
DELETE with wrong password fails (401)
Create worker operator works
Create manager operator works
Dashboard tiles - All 6 visible (TVT, Milestones, DTS, Emergency, P1 Alert, Support)
Dashboard tiles - Light up when count > 0 (DTS=2, P1=1, Support=19)
Dashboard tiles - Click navigates to correct route (TVT → /ops/transition)
Worker cannot access /api/ops/team-tasks (403)
Worker cannot access /api/founder/operators (403)
Worker cannot delete operators (403 - Manager access required)
Manager with wrong password cannot delete (401)
action_items: Consider adding Operators/Subs tabs visibility for founders in ops mode (line 605 in AdminPage.js) - add check for user.role === 'admin' alongside operator_role === 'manager'
Test manager account UI visibility by creating test account with known password
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPage.js line 605: Tab filter only checks `user?.operator_role === 'manager'` - founders (role=admin) won't see Operators/Subs in ops mode. Consider: `if (user?.operator_role === 'manager' || user?.role === 'admin') opsTabs.push(...)` if founders should have these tabs in ops mode
OperatorsTab.js lines 172, 194: canDelete and canEdit props correctly implemented - canDelete is true for isFounder or (isManager and target is worker)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (tiles working, navigation working, role restrictions enforced in backend)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 dashboard tiles verified working. Backend APIs for dashboard-events, team-tasks, admin stats new fields all working. Delete permissions correctly enforced at backend level. Tab visibility in ops mode may need adjustment - founders viewing /ops don't see Operators/Subs tabs but can access via /admin portal.
